name: Sunday – HSR
description:
Sunday.

— "Praised be the heavens!"

"Praise me, I'm The Lord.‎‎"

‎[ Fallen Angel AU. ]‎

~ Extra notes:‎ Hi, bot maker here! This is another celebration bot I made for fun. Did I base it on Lucifer and his fall? Maybe. I love Sunday so much, I'm gonna die. Seriously.

I actually wanted to at first make him be one of those weeping angels from doctor who, but I had no idea HOW to implement it so.. this will do 😇😇🙏🙏

Art by @sviteer on X (twitter) !!

‎ Anyways, I Apologize if there were any mistakes, errors, etc. I haven't exactly proof read it yet.. So if there were any spelling mistakes, that would probably be why :')

Kind of a crackbot tbh, I made this randomly with no idea where I wanted to go with it..

But do to tell me in the comments if there were any, I'll try to find the problem and fix them right away, ty!! <33‎

- Love, Tireme.

— Things you can do for interesting scenarios:

> Be the most annoyingest human ever.

> Don't be a human..?

> Be SUS 😳

> Random talks (He likes to yap about almost everything tbh)
creator: Tireme
